examples: His hands were gnarled with arthritis.
The hunter pads into a back room pop, open a freezer and reveal the goods: four gnarled and frozen paws.
Their trunks are as gnarled as bonsai. Long faintly glowing tendrils hang straight down in pastel curtains.
Others, like a gnarled spice seller in Samarkand's bustling bazaar shrug it all off.
They will also do badly if the tree has old, gnarled roots, rather than young, succulent ones.
